backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all CMS data types (Artwork, Testimonial, BlogPost, etc.) and stable variables for persistence, with public query/update functions for reading and writing all CMS content including artworks, inquiries, notifications, site settings, and analytics.
backend/migration.mo: Motoko migration module that defines the old and new actor state shapes (identical) and exports a no-op `run` function used during canister upgrades to preserve existing stable data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the audit and fix of the full CMS persistence pipeline, listing the affected frontend files that wire CMSContext mutations to useCMSBackend backend calls.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's React component and page structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes, covering colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title and meta description for Susan Richten's fine art site and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that configures TanStack Router with all public and admin routes, wraps the app in CMSProvider, AuthProvider, ThemeProvider, and QueryClientProvider, and defines separate PublicLayout and AdminLayout route trees.
frontend/src/components/admin/AboutPageE: An admin editor for the About page that allows editing the artist bio and statement, and managing career milestones and press mentions with add/delete functionality.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Provides the admin panel shell with a responsive sidebar navigation, authentication guard (redirects to login if unauthenticated), and an Outlet for nested admin routes.
frontend/src/components/admin/ArtworkFor: Modal form component for creating or editing an artwork entry, supporting primary and additional image uploads via FileReader and all artwork metadata fields.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostFo: Modal form for creating or editing a blog post with fields for title, auto-generated slug, content, publish date, and draft/published status.
frontend/src/components/admin/Commission: Admin editor for the Commissions page that allows updating hero/pricing text, adding/deleting process steps, and managing FAQ items via the CMS context.
frontend/src/components/admin/HeroEditor: Admin form for editing the homepage hero section fields (artist name, tagline, intro text) and saving them to site settings via the CMS context.
frontend/src/components/admin/InquiryRow: Table row component for a single commission inquiry that displays contact details, project info, and a clickable status badge that cycles through workflow statuses.
Renders a single media item tile with thumbnail, hover overlay actions for replacing or deleting the image, and inline tag management (add/remove tags).
frontend/src/components/admin/Navigation: Admin UI component for editing site navigation items (label and path), supporting add, remove, and save operations backed by CMSContext.
frontend/src/components/admin/PressEdito: Admin editor for managing press mentions with fields for publication, date, headline, URL, and excerpt, supporting add, remove, and save via CMSContext.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: Admin editor for managing client testimonials with fields for quote, name, location, and role, supporting add, remove, and save via CMSContext.
frontend/src/components/ArtworkCard.tsx: Displays a single artwork as a card with image, metadata, availability badge, and photo count. Sold artworks show a 'Request This Style' button that navigates to the commissions page.
Fixed-position button that appears after scrolling 400px and smoothly scrolls the page back to the top when clicked.
frontend/src/components/BeforeAfterSlide: Interactive drag slider component that reveals a 'before' image overlaid on an 'after' image, supporting both mouse and touch input.
frontend/src/components/Breadcrumbs.tsx: Simple breadcrumb navigation component that renders a Home link followed by the current page name.
frontend/src/components/CareerTimeline.t: Renders a vertical timeline of career milestones, each showing a year, dot marker, and event description.
frontend/src/components/CommissionInquir: Two-step commission inquiry form with validation that pre-fills the description from a URL query param and submits data via the CMS context.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Simple contact form with name, email, and message fields, validation, and submission via the CMS context's addContactInquiry method.
frontend/src/components/FAQAccordion.tsx: Accordion component that renders a list of FAQ items, toggling one open at a time with an animated expand/collapse transition.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying brand info, navigation links, social icons, page view/visitor counters, and an admin sign-in link, all driven by CMS context.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with desktop navigation links and a mobile hamburger menu, highlighting the active route and pulling nav items from CMS context.
frontend/src/components/HeroSlideshow.ts: A full-screen hero slideshow component that cycles through artwork images every 5 seconds with fade transitions, prev/next arrows, dot indicators, and overlaid artist name, tagline, and CTA links.
frontend/src/components/Lightbox.tsx: A modal lightbox component that displays a selected artwork's images (including additional images) with photo and artwork navigation arrows, dot indicators, keyboard support, and a detail panel.
A small presentational component that renders a styled italic placeholder message when information is unavailable.
frontend/src/components/NewsletterSignup: An email newsletter signup form that shows a success message after submission and uses the CMS context for the input placeholder text.
frontend/src/components/PlaceholderImage: A lazy-loading image wrapper that renders a beige placeholder until the element is visible in the viewport, then loads the actual image.
frontend/src/components/PressMentionCard: A card component that displays a press mention with publication name, date, headline, excerpt, and an external link icon.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: A loading skeleton component that renders one or more placeholder cards in artwork, testimonial, or press variants using the Skeleton UI primitive.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonForm.tsx: A loading skeleton that mimics a multi-field form layout with two name fields, two single-line fields, a textarea, and a submit button.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialCarou: A single-item testimonial carousel with prev/next buttons and dot indicators that cycles through a list of testimonials.
A two-column grid that renders all testimonials as bordered quote cards with the author's name, location, and role.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Provides authentication context with login, logout, and password-change functionality, persisting auth state and password to localStorage.
frontend/src/contexts/CMSContext.tsx: Central CMS context that aggregates all site content types (artworks, testimonials, press, navigation, settings, etc.) with default data, delegating persistence to the useCMSBackend hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using the current identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCMSBackend.ts: Defines frontend TypeScript interfaces mirroring backend CMS types and provides conversion helpers between frontend and backend data shapes, plus a `useCMSBackend` hook that wraps actor calls for all CMS CRUD operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useLazyLoad.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to lazily mark a referenced div as visible once it enters the viewport.
frontend/src/hooks/usePageMeta.ts: Hook that updates the document title and meta description tag based on SEO settings from the CMS context for a given page key.
frontend/src/hooks/usePageViewTracker.ts: Hook that increments the backend page view counter on mount and returns the current page view count.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating page view counts and unique visitor counts via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useUniqueVisitorTrack: Hook that generates or retrieves a persistent visitor ID from localStorage and registers it with the backend on mount, returning the unique visitor count.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines the site's CSS custom properties (color palette, typography, animations) and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component that renders the artist bio, portrait, social links, artist statement, career timeline, and press mentions sourced from the CMS context.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page with a password field (show/hide toggle) that calls the AuthContext login function and displays an error message on failure.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogManager.tsx: Admin blog manager page listing all blog posts in a table with publish/draft toggle, edit, and delete actions, and a form for creating or editing posts.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommissionsMana: Admin page for managing commission inquiries with status filtering tabs, a CSV export feature, and a table of inquiry rows with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard overview page displaying stats (artworks, categories, inquiries, featured works), quick action buttons, and a list of recent commission inquiries.
Admin page for managing artworks with add/edit/delete functionality, bulk actions (feature, sold, available), and a sortable artwork table with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaLibrary.ts: Admin media library page that supports multi-file image uploads (stored as data URLs), search by filename or tag, and displays results in a responsive grid of media tiles.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MessagesInbox.t: Admin inbox page for viewing contact/commission notifications with filter tabs (all, unread, responded), expandable message rows, status updates, and delete confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PagesEditor.tsx: Admin page editor with tabbed navigation for editing content sections (hero, navigation, about, commissions, testimonials, press) and a preview link for the active page.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Settings.tsx: Admin Settings page component that provides forms for editing site-wide configuration including SEO settings per page, social platform URLs, and a change-password form with show/hide toggles.
frontend/src/pages/Commissions.tsx: Commissions page that displays a hero section, commission process steps, pricing text, a portfolio sample with lightbox, an inquiry form, and an FAQ accordion, all driven by CMS data with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page displaying a message form, studio location, a decorative map placeholder, and social media links (Instagram, Facebook, Pinterest) pulled from CMS site settings.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Gallery page that renders filterable, searchable artwork cards with category tabs, a lightbox viewer, and URL-driven lightbox opening via a query param.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a hero slideshow, artist intro text, a featured artworks grid, and a testimonials section, all driven by CMS data with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials page showing client quotes in either carousel or grid view, plus a press mentions section, all sourced from CMS with skeleton loading states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom design tokens including beige/charcoal/gold/sage color palettes using oklch, custom heading/body font families, and extended theme values for shadows, border radius, and sidebar/chart colors.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 43) describing the art portfolio CMS app's architecture, existing features, and known issues such as broken admin auth, non-persistent CMS state, and placeholder image rendering problems.
